utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler , we still have not gotten an RSVP from your dad .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh ! Right . Umm , maybe that is because I did not send him an invitation .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler ! He is your father . he should be at the wedding .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I did not send him an invitation .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I do not even know the man . Okay ? We are not that close . I have not seen him in years .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I do not even know the man . Okay ? We are not that close . I have not seen him in years .

utterances.text: Well what are you gonna do when he finds out he was not even asked ? !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
